@startuml
actor Time as t1
control tradecenter 
participant wms 

boundary "合作商仓储系统" as s2
interface Aftership


t1 ->>wms : [030] 定时推送运单\n==\n[非最终状态]\nwms->s2:[040] 回传发货信息imei运单号等 \ns2-->tradecenter:生成运单信息\nnote right of s2:wms内部处理，不对外交互。\ntimeout {    alt   } else     endaltendtimeout



@enduml
